name: Name
are_you_sure: Are you sure you want to perform this operation?
delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete? This operation cannot be undone.
delete_strategy_confirm_msg: Are you sure you want to delete strategy "{{name}}"? This operation cannot be undone.
Duration.desc: Time span of the strategy backtest
Exposure Time [%].desc: Percentage of time the strategy held positions
Equity Final [$].desc: Final asset value of the strategy
Sortino Ratio.desc: Return ratio considering only downside risk
Calmar Ratio.desc: Ratio of return to maximum drawdown
Profit Factor.desc: Ratio of gross profit to gross loss
Best Trade [%].desc: Highest percentage gain in a single trade
Worst Trade [%].desc: Largest percentage loss in a single trade
Max. Trade Duration.desc: Longest duration of a single trade

click_to_get_api_key: Click here to get API Key

ai_welcome: I'm your AI strategy assistant. What strategy do you need?
ai_example: E.g., create a dual moving average crossover strategy
ai_loaded_to_editor: AI generated strategy loaded to editor
reparse_warning: Reparse will extract strategy info from current code and overwrite preview display. This won't save to database. Continue?

strategy_desc_sma: Dual moving average crossover strategy using unified strategy interface. Buy when short MA crosses above long MA, sell when crosses below.
sma_cross_config_desc: Supports single and multi-symbol backtest, unified list parameter format
sma_cross_simplest: Simplest dual moving average crossover strategy implementation:
sma_cross_step2: - Buy when short MA crosses above long MA
sma_cross_step3: - Sell when short MA crosses below long MA
sma_cross_multi_support: Supports multiple symbols, maintains independent price history and SMA values for each symbol.
current_short_close_buy: Currently short, close position then buy
current_long_noop: Already holding long, no action needed
current_no_long_noop: Not holding long, no action needed
